response.justification: The candidate demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience (8+ years) with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack. Their background in AI agent development, cloud platforms, and enterprise tooling further strengthens their fit. Leadership in open-source projects and workshops showcases technical depth and collaboration skills, though some concerns exist around language diversity and recent backend focus.
strengths: 8+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly matching the primary stack.
Proven track record in AI agent development and enterprise tooling, including contributions to Model Context Protocol (MCP) frameworks.
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, workshops), demonstrating leadership and technical depth.
concerns: Limited recent exposure to Kotlin/Java (secondary stack requirement), with more focus on TypeScript/DLang.
Some roles emphasize frontend/mobile (e.g., Apple TV/iOS at WatchUp), which may dilute backend depth.
German language skills are basic, which could impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
